General.Name: Global Net Lease Inc.
General.Description: Global Net Lease, Inc. is a publicly traded internally managed real estate investment trust that focuses on acquiring and managing a global portfolio of income producing net lease assets across the U.S., and Western and Northern Europe. Global Net Lease, Inc. was incorporated in 2011 in Maryland, USA.
